channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tragedy at King David Junior School Claims Lives of Students and Teacher
item.description: A memorial post has revealed the names of 21 pupils and one teacher from King David Junior School in Kampala who died in the Kapchorwa bus crash on 16 July 2026. The incident, which shocked Uganda and...

item.title: Mandela's Legacy: Lessons in Character and Leadership
item.description: The article reflects on Nelson Mandela's enduring influence through his character and values rather than academic credentials. It highlights how Mandela's decision to forgive his oppressors and priori...

item.title: Natalie Imbruglia Reflects on Career, Fears, and Personal Traits in New Interview
item.description: Natalie Imbruglia, 51, shares candid insights about her life, career, and personal struggles in a recent interview. Born in Sydney to an Italian father and Australian mother, she rose to fame with her...

item.title: Elizabeth McGovern's 1980s Career and Iconic Looks
item.description: This article explores Elizabeth McGovern's rise to fame during the 1980s, highlighting her distinctive style and notable film roles. Born in 1961, McGovern became a prominent actress known for her nat...

item.title: Ekiti State Achieves Record IGR of N2.7bn Through Tax Reforms and Compliance
item.description: The Ekiti State Government has reported a significant increase in its Internal Generated Revenue (IGR) for the month, reaching N2.7 billion without introducing new taxes. The achievement is attributed...

item.title: India's private rocket Vikram-1 successfully places 6 payloads in low-Earth orbit
item.description: India's private space venture, Vikram Aerospace, has achieved a historic milestone by successfully launching its rocket Vikram-1 and placing six payloads into low-Earth orbit. The mission, which marks...

item.title: Ombudsman Remulla's Investigation into 2019 SEA Games Sports Facilities
item.description: The Ombudsman's office is reopening its investigation into alleged irregularities in the construction of sports facilities for the 2019 Southeast Asian Games, emphasizing reliance on factual evidence....

item.title: Missing Mother and Infant in Northern B.C. Seek Public's Help
item.description: A 31-year-old mother, Nicole Andrus, and her one-month-old son, Krew Gordon, have been missing since July 9 in northern British Columbia. RCMP in Fort St. John are appealing to the public for assistan...

item.title: Florida's GOP Primary Intensifies as DeSantis Refuses to Back Contenders
item.description: Florida Governor Ron DeSantis' refusal to support any clear frontrunner in the state's gubernatorial race has turned the contest into a contentious GOP primary marked by race-baiting and in-fighting. ...

item.title: Ebola outbreak in DRC continues with 2,124 cases and 828 deaths
item.description: The Bundibugyo virus disease (BVD) outbreak in the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) remains active, with sustained transmission driving increases in reported cases and deaths. As of 15 July 2026...

item.title: Moses Kuria Assures Continued Development Projects in Ol Kalou Despite UDA Loss
